scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../server && npm install
